$notes: Optional pack contribution to MergeCore's 'What Breaks In Prod?' scanner. Loaded by @mergecore/intelligence/prod-risks. Each entry follows the ProdRiskRule shape. Unknown categories are ignored; rules that overlap a built-in id override the built-in.

rules.title: Shared counter mutated from concurrent request handlers
rules.description: A module-scope counter incremented inside an Express/Fastify/Nest handler is shared across every in-flight request. Under load this both under-counts and reveals race windows to other state updates nearby.
rules.fixHint: Move the counter to a persistent atomic store (Redis INCR, Postgres UPDATE ... SET n = n + 1), or a metrics client like prom-client's Counter.

rules.title: logger.info receives a value typed as any
rules.description: Passing `any`-typed payloads to a structured logger means a later refactor can quietly start logging new fields that contain PII or secrets.
rules.fixHint: Type the payload explicitly, or wrap with a redaction-aware serializer (pino-redact, winston-format).
